subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto them who have attained unto His presence time and again, and have quaffed the choice wine of divine knowledge from His hands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فاز باللقاء مره بعد مره و اخذ رحیق العرفان من ایادی
